docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JOHN SHEK APPEARED. DEFENDANT LIU GUIHUA APPEARED ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER MIMI LAIN. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEK, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUIHUA, LIU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT GUIHUA, LIU
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SHEK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT GUIHUA, LIU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED APR-20-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUIHUA, LIU
